creator: wombat@marsupial.org
text:
I'm terribly sorry for the delay, this was getting embarrassing.

Here are is the updated maven32 port as well as the poudriere logs. I'm unsure I got what you wanted for the latter, so let me know if that wasn't it.

The reason I want to create a maven32 port is because the Apache foundation currently currently 3, 3.1 and 3.2, so I think it makes sense to have them all three.
